comments.body: Added commit that uses newly built iamges
Oops, need to wait for new libseccomp packages.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3792) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
This pull request had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the pull request will be automatically closed within 7 days.

> Can we close this one?

Naw, it's minor but handy to have the package version logged in every run.  I see we've got new libseccomp packages with the bug-fix.  Trying again with those...
sigh...waiting on me to fix the base-images...
